metadata.scheme_name: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Meritorious Students Incentive Scheme (Class 12th Passed)

raw_data.details: The scheme "Dr. A. P. J. Abdul Kalam Meritorious Students Incentive Scheme" was launched by the School Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, to motivate students from lower economic backgrounds and support them economically. Under this scheme, a cash award of ₹5,000 is given to the students who have obtained the highest marks in the 12th class examination in government schools within their district. To be eligible for this benefit, the annual income of the student's parents must be less than ₹1,00,000.
raw_data.benefits: Under this scheme, students who achieve the highest marks in the 12th class examination in government schools within their district will receive ₹5,000. Note: The scholarship is sent directly to the student's bank account.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh. The student must have achieved the highest marks in their district in the Class 12 examination. The student must have passed their Class 12 examination from a government school in Madhya Pradesh (Government Higher Secondary School). The student's parents' income from all sources should be less than ₹1,00,000 per year.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineTo avail of the benefits under this scheme, eligible students can contact the Principal of their respective government schools/institutions. Note: The student's profile is entered on the education portal [https://shikshaportal.mp.gov.in/](https://shikshaportal.mp.gov.in/) by the teacher of the educational institution as per the record/certificate provided by the student.
raw_data.documents_required: 1. Passport-size Photo2. Aadhaar card3. Domicile certificate of Madhya Pradesh4. Ration card5. Class 12 marksheet6. Income certificate7. Samagra ID8. Bank Passbook9. Any other documents as required
raw_data.scheme_name: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Meritorious Students Incentive Scheme (Class 12th Passed)

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Students who are permanent residents of Madhya Pradesh, have achieved the highest marks in their district in the Class 12 examination, have passed from a government school, and whose parents' annual income is less than ₹1,00,000 are eligible.

faqs.question: What is the amount awarded under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligible students receive a cash award of ₹5,000.

faqs.question: How is the cash award disbursed?
faqs.answer: The scholarship amount is directly sent to the student's bank account.

faqs.question: What are the income criteria for eligibility?
faqs.answer: The annual income of the student's parents must be less than ₹1,00,000.

faqs.question: Can students from private schools apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only students from government schools (Government Higher Secondary Schools) are eligible.

faqs.question: How can students apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Students should contact the Principal of their respective government schools/institutions to apply for the scheme.

faqs.question: Is there a specific portal for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, students' profiles are entered on the education portal https://shikshaportal.mp.gov.in/ by their teachers based on the records/certificates provided.

faqs.question: Can a student from a government school outside Madhya Pradesh apply?
faqs.answer: No, only students from government schools within Madhya Pradesh are eligible for the scheme.
